goal: register an account
benefit: access the application
acceptance_criteria: The registration form accepts a valid email, password, and username.
An error is shown for invalid emails.
Duplicate emails and usernames are rejected.
A successful registration logs the user in and confirms account creation.

goal: log in
benefit: access my personal dashboard and group functionalities
acceptance_criteria: The login form accepts correct credentials and denies incorrect ones.
A session is maintained until logout.
Error messages are displayed on failed login attempts.

goal: view my basic personal details (username, email, etc.)
benefit: confirm my account information
acceptance_criteria: The profile page displays core personal information (e.g., username, email, bio).
Data loads correctly and errors are handled with sensible messages.
This view is accessible only to logged-in users.

goal: search for and browse movies by keywords and genres
benefit: find movies to add to my lists
acceptance_criteria: A search bar accepts keywords and returns a list of movies with details (title, poster, and brief description).
The UI provides genre filtering options.
The search functionality is accessible from various parts of the application (e.g., when managing lists).
Appropriate error messages are shown if no results are found or if the query is invalid.

goal: manage my want-to-watch list
benefit: add or remove movies using the shared search functionality
acceptance_criteria: Only the owner can edit their want-to-watch list.
Movies can be manually added or removed.
Duplicate movies cannot be added, with an error shown if attempted.
Within the want-to-watch list, a search option is displayed, that allows to find movies through the search functionality

goal: manage my watched list
benefit: track movies I've seen using the shared search functionality
acceptance_criteria: Only the owner can edit their watched list.
Movies can be added or removed from the watched list.
Duplicate entries are prevented, with an error displayed if attempted.
Within the Watched list, a search option is displayed, that allows to find movies through the search functionality

goal: search for movies
benefit: add them to my watched list
acceptance_criteria: The user can search for movies by keywords.
The user can filter movies by genre from the UI.
Movies from the search can be added to the watched list.

goal: manage my friends list
benefit: invite or remove friends
acceptance_criteria: Only the owner can edit their friends list.
Only registered usernames can be invited.
Duplicate invitations are prevented.
Invited friends receive an in-app request; upon acceptance, the friendship becomes mutual.

goal: create a group
benefit: add friends for movie night
acceptance_criteria: A new group is created when a valid, unique group name is provided (with suggestions offered if the name is taken).
The group is associated with the creator's account and visible in their group list.
Duplicate group names trigger an error.

goal: invite friends to my group
benefit: they can participate in the movie selection process
acceptance_criteria: The group creator can invite registered users individually or by selecting multiple friends from their friends list.
Invited users receive an in-app request; acceptance makes them group members.
Users can leave the group on their own.
Invitations from friends (when applicable) are automatically accepted.

goal: delete my group
benefit: terminate the group movie night event
acceptance_criteria: The group creator can delete the group at any time.
Group deletion triggers notifications to all group members.
The group is removed from every member's group list.

goal: search for movies via the TMDb API
benefit: find films to add to the group pool
acceptance_criteria: A search query returns a list of movies with titles, posters, and brief details including a "Watch Trailer" button (opening a new YouTube tab).
Invalid queries return a "no results found" message.
The search function responds within a reasonable time.
The search supports movie titles, directors, and actors.

goal: add a movie from search results or my lists to the group pool
benefit: my suggestion is included in the movie selection
acceptance_criteria: A movie can be added by clicking an "Add" button.
The movie appears immediately in the group pool.
Duplicate entries are not allowed, and an error is displayed if attempted.

goal: view the current movie pool
benefit: see all suggested movies
acceptance_criteria: The pool displays all movies with relevant details.
The UI updates in real time when new movies are added.
The movie pool is visible to all group members.

goal: submit my ranking preferences for movies in the pool
benefit: my choice influences the final selection
acceptance_criteria: Each user can rank all movies in the pool (e.g., 1 for favorite up to 5 for least favorite).
The ranking is registered in the system and displayed in the UI.

goal: automatically calculate the average rankings and select the winning movie
benefit: the group's choice is finalized without manual intervention
acceptance_criteria: After the ranking period ends, the system calculates the average ranking accurately.
The movie with the highest average (or lowest numerical rank) is automatically selected.
The winning movie is clearly displayed to the group.

goal: apply a tiebreaker when multiple movies receive the same average rank
benefit: a clear winner is determined
acceptance_criteria: In a tie, the system applies the highest individual rank as the tiebreaker.
The tiebreaker process is logged and documented.
The final decision is clearly displayed to all group members.

goal: view the ranking results
benefit: understand how the final movie was selected
acceptance_criteria: The results page displays the average ranking for each movie.
The winning movie is highlighted.

goal: validate submitted rankings
benefit: ensure each ranking is for a movie in the pool and maintain selection integrity
acceptance_criteria: Rankings cannot be submitted for movies not in the pool.
Invalid submissions trigger appropriate error messages.
All valid rankings are logged with the user ID and a timestamp.

goal: clear feedback from the UI
benefit: know when my actions succeed or fail
acceptance_criteria: Confirmation messages appear for successful actions (registration, group creation, movie addition, vote submission, etc.).
Error messages are displayed for any invalid inputs (e.g., duplicate votes, invalid formats).
The UI promptly reflects the outcome of user actions.

goal: set my movie preferences during registration
benefit: the system can offer personalized suggestions
acceptance_criteria: Upon registration, the user is prompted to select favorite genres using a multiselect interface.
The user can opt out of providing preferences.

goal: search for and select one movie as my favorite
benefit: it is stored in my profile
acceptance_criteria: The user can search through movies and select one as their favorite.
The selected movie is saved and displayed on the user's profile.

goal: see a list of 5 movie suggestions on my profile
benefit: easily add new movies to my want-to-watch list
acceptance_criteria: The system suggests 5 movies based on the user's favorite genres and overall movie popularity.
Movies already on the want-to-watch or watched lists are not suggested.
Suggested movies can be added to either the want-to-watch or watched list.

goal: improved movie suggestions that consider multiple dimensions
benefit: the recommendations better match my taste
acceptance_criteria: Movie suggestions are generated using multiple dimensions (genre, actors, directors, popularity, and user history such as negative ratings).
The algorithm updates suggestions based on the user's watch and rating history.

goal: view other users' profiles
benefit: see their movie preferences
acceptance_criteria: The profile page displays other users' information such as favorite genres and favorite film.
Users can set their profile to private to avoid being found.
Public profiles are searchable by username.
Users can control which information is public (e.g., show favorite film but hide the watch list).

goal: access a "discover movies" page
benefit: visually browse movie suggestions in a Tinder-like style
acceptance_criteria: The page displays movie suggestions in card format with posters and brief descriptions.
Each card includes a link or button to view the trailer (which may open in a new tab or inline as per design).
The UI supports swipe and click interactions for navigation.

goal: interact with movie suggestions
benefit: easily add or dismiss them
acceptance_criteria: Liking a movie adds it to the want-to-watch list.
Downvoting a movie prevents it from being suggested again.
The UI immediately reflects the outcome of these interactions.

goal: see additional movie suggestions below the current pool
benefit: have more options for the group selection
acceptance_criteria: The suggested movies shown have not yet been seen by any group member.
The suggestions follow the established movie suggestion algorithm.

goal: change my vote before the deadline
benefit: update my preference if my opinion changes
acceptance_criteria: Users can change their vote prior to the end of the voting period.
Only the last vote is counted in the final tally.
The UI immediately reflects the updated vote.

goal: review movies on my watched list
benefit: provide feedback on the movies I've seen
acceptance_criteria: In the watched list, each movie displays a 1–5 star rating interface.
Users can submit and later edit their ratings.

goal: weight movies that are suggested by several users
benefit: the group's preference is fairly represented
acceptance_criteria: When a movie is suggested by multiple users, its vote count is multiplied by a weight factor.

goal: enforce strong password requirements
benefit: user accounts are secure
acceptance_criteria: The password must be at least 12 characters long.
It must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character (e.g., !@$%^&()).

goal: watch movie trailers directly in the web application
benefit: quickly preview films
acceptance_criteria: Search results include a trailer displayed directly in the UI.
Integration with YouTube API is implemented to fetch the trailer.

goal: movie details to appear when I hover over a movie poster
benefit: quickly see more information
acceptance_criteria: Movie details are displayed in a tooltip or overlay upon hovering over the poster.
